title: connect_timeout(15s) in client.rs has no comment explaining the value
description: LightwalletdClient::connect now sets .connect_timeout(Duration::from_secs(15)) but the value 15 is uncommented. The doc-comment for connect() mentions that TLS handshake is performed but says nothing about the timeout. Maintainers need to know: why 15s and not 5s or 30s? Is this large enough to cover Tor circuit build time (which can be 20-30s)? If nie-relay later supports a Tor-only mode, 15s may be too short. Document the rationale: typical internet TLS ≈ 1-3s, added buffer for high-latency paths; note that Tor is not covered by this timeout (transport-layer proxy timeout is separate).
